settings.offer_text: Buy LevelUp Grips and your free Sniperform Shaker is applied automatically at checkout. No code. No extra clicks.
settings.founder_heading: The product story becomes stronger when the founder problem is specific.
settings.founder_quote: After 20 years of lifting, I realised one side of my body always did more work. My chest was uneven, my posture twisted, and eventually my shoulder tore.
settings.final_heading: Ready to stop guessing through your reps?
settings.final_text: LevelUp gives you the thick-grip arm-growth story buyers already want, then adds the patented balance feedback that makes the offer feel smarter, more useful, and easier to justify.

settings.question: Will LevelUp fit my bars and dumbbells?
settings.answer: Yes. The current live store positions LevelUp for standard Olympic barbells and dumbbells in the 28–32mm range.

settings.question: How does it help bigger arms and more balanced lifting?
settings.answer: The thick-grip diameter increases grip, forearm and bicep demand, while the patented level cue helps keep force distribution more even as the set gets harder.

settings.question: How fast is shipping?
settings.answer: According to the current live store, orders placed before 2pm AEDT are dispatched the same day. Australia-wide delivery is currently positioned at 1–4 business days after dispatch, and the site also calls out U.S.A shipping.

settings.question: What happens if it is not for me?
settings.answer: Sniperform currently offers a 30-day money-back guarantee. That guarantee stays visible near the buy buttons because it directly lowers hesitation.

settings.question: What is included with the offer?
settings.answer: The page is currently positioned around one pair of LevelUp Performance Grips, with a free Sniperform Shaker auto-applied at checkout while stocks last.
